attempt_local_note: Attempt-local instance issued by the orchestrator under the named human's recorded live delegation. Supersedes the pending human_review fields in provenance.json and regression.json by lineage.

delegator.name: Choe Mun-yeong
delegator.delegation_quote_verbatim: 이 정도는 그냥 너가 판단해도 되는 수준

verdict_translation: Accepted as a development baseline for the strict-residue repair: 3 real text_on_path defects fixed by bounded position moves, 6 confirmed false positives declared via the existing fixture-scoped known-FP mechanism. Overall polish/completeness NOT claimed.
scope_note: Development-baseline acceptance of the R5.2e strict-residue closure. Panel D 'constant voltage', Panel E 'probe', and Panel F 'floating polymer cantilever' moved to clear their real path overlaps (visual_clash raw: 4 defect candidates removed, zero new). Six glyph-scoped false-positive patterns added to _known_false_positives.yaml. strict compile is GREEN for the first time across the B..C5 lineage.

strict_first_green.explicit_non_claims: strict-green establishes only the machine-valid evidence layer (schemas, compile, declared assertions, deterministic checks pass). It is NOT visually re-reviewed acceptance, NOT human-development completeness, NOT release, and NOT publication acceptance. The Panel F 'grounded source return' defect remains a declared permanently-open item (out of bounded-repair scope).
strict_first_green.detail: check_visual_clash --strict --ignore-known-fp: 0 blocking, 27 report-only, 6 suppressed; undeclared_geometry 0; strict_status state=passed.

accepted_known_open_items: Panel F 'grounded source return' remains permanently open (declared since C4; label vocabulary exhausted, needs a future authoring/layout iteration).
27 report-only visual_clash candidates remain (near_miss + own-glyph-enclosure 'S' atoms) -- sub-blocking by design, not defects.
